languageSuggestion.title: Change Language?
languageSuggestion.messageAr: Would you like to view this site in Arabic?
languageSuggestion.messageEs: Would you like to view this site in Spanish?

landing.heroSubtitle: The fastest way for businesses to achieve internationally recognized ISO certifications. Apply online, get audited, and receive your certificate — all from one platform.
landing.howCertDesc: From registration to certification in three simple steps
landing.step1Desc: Create an account and provide your company details to get started.
landing.step2Desc: Choose the certification type that fits your business needs.
landing.step3Desc: After a successful audit, receive your internationally recognized certificate.
landing.supportedStandardsDesc: We support the most requested international standards
landing.iso9001Desc: Demonstrate your ability to consistently provide products and services that meet customer and regulatory requirements.
landing.iso14001Desc: Show your commitment to environmental responsibility and sustainable operations.
landing.iso45001Desc: Protect your workforce with internationally recognized health and safety standards.
landing.iso22000Desc: Ensure food safety across the entire supply chain from farm to fork.
landing.benefitsDesc: Join thousands of companies that trust Certify.cx™ for their ISO needs
landing.benefitGlobalDesc: IAF-accredited certifications recognized in 100+ countries worldwide.
landing.benefitFastDesc: Streamlined digital workflow reduces certification time by up to 60%.
landing.benefitSecureDesc: Enterprise-grade security with full audit trails and compliance tracking.
landing.benefitTrackingDesc: Monitor your certification status and progress from a single dashboard.
landing.benefitAuditorsDesc: Access a network of certified auditors across all major regions.
landing.benefitRegionDesc: Operations in Asia, Africa, Europe, North America, and South America.
landing.ctaDesc: Start your ISO certification journey today. It takes less than 5 minutes to apply.
landing.footerTagline: The fastest way to achieve internationally recognized ISO certifications.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your Certify.cx™ account
auth.registrationUnderReview: Your registration is now under review. A CertifyCX administrator will verify your details and approve your account. You will be able to log in once your account has been approved.
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetLinkSent: We've sent a password reset link to
auth.validationCompanyFields: Please fill in all required company fields
auth.validationContactFields: Please fill in all contact fields
auth.validationCertType: Please select at least one certification type
auth.validationPasswordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

unauthorized.noPermission: You don't have permission to access this page.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.takeGapAnalysisDesc: Find out if your organization is ready for ISO certification.
dashboard.needsWork: Your organization needs some foundational work before starting the certification process. Please contact our support team for guidance.
dashboard.readyForCertDesc: Your organization demonstrates strong foundational practices. Choose a certification below to begin your journey.
dashboard.paymentReadyDesc: Your application is ready for processing. Please complete the payment to proceed.
dashboard.uploadDocsDesc: Please upload your compliance procedures and manuals in the Document Management section below.
dashboard.noTasks: No pending tasks at this time. We will notify you when the next step requires action.
dashboard.aiRecommendation: We analyzed your industry and recommended
dashboard.adminReview: Your application is now under review.
dashboard.adminAuditScheduled: Your audit has been scheduled. Prepare your documents.
dashboard.pleaseUploadDocs: Please upload the following documents for your certification:
dashboard.noDocsYet: No documents uploaded yet. Upload your compliance manuals or supporting files here.
dashboard.noAppsFound: No applications found in the database.
dashboard.noAppsAssigned: No applications assigned to you yet.
dashboard.noAppsCB: No applications assigned to your certification body yet.
dashboard.portalSetup: Your portal is currently being set up. Check back later.
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

application.title: New ISO Certification Application
application.subtitle: Provide details about your organization to get started.
application.applyingFor: You are applying for the {{package}} package.

gapAnalysis.title: ISO Readiness Gap Analysis
gapAnalysis.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions to determine your organization's readiness for ISO certification.
gapAnalysis.lowScoreMsg: Based on your score ({{score}}%), your organization needs some foundational work in process documentation and management before starting the certification process.
gapAnalysis.lowScoreHelp: Don't worry! Many companies start here. Please contact our support team to get guidance on how to build these operational foundations.
gapAnalysis.highScoreMsg: Excellent! Your organization demonstrates strong foundational practices. Head to your dashboard to view recommended certifications and begin your certification journey.
gapAnalysis.q1: Do you have documented operating procedures for your main processes?
gapAnalysis.q2: Is top management actively involved in and committed to quality/compliance standards?
gapAnalysis.q3: Do you have a system in place to track customer feedback and handle complaints?
gapAnalysis.q4: Do you conduct regular internal reviews or audits of your processes?
gapAnalysis.q5: Do you have a dedicated compliance or quality officer/team?

payment.referralDiscountDesc: You signed up via a referral link. Enjoy your discount.

settings.title: Settings
settings.manageAccount: Manage your account and platform settings
settings.passwordsRequired: Please fill in both password fields.
settings.payoutsDesc: Manage commission payouts to referrers. When a referral converts, the referrer receives an in-app notification to send their bank details to your email.
settings.noConvertedReferrals: No converted referrals yet. Payouts will appear here when referrals convert.
settings.payoutMarkedPaid: Payout marked as paid. Referrer has been notified.
settings.regionManagementDesc: Configure active regions for your platform ({{active}} of {{total}} active)
settings.rolesDesc: View the permission matrix for all roles
settings.platformNameDesc: The name displayed across the platform
settings.emailNotificationsDesc: Receive email alerts for certification updates
settings.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of account security

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Stay updated on your referrals, payouts, and account activity
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: You will be notified here when there are updates to your referrals, payouts, or account.

referrals.title: Referral Program
referrals.subtitle: Earn 10% commission from every sale. Referred clients get 10% off their purchase!
referrals.shareLinkHint: Share this link with potential clients. They get 10% off their purchase, and you earn 10% commission!
referrals.step1Desc: Send your unique referral link to potential clients
referrals.step2Desc: When they register using your link, they get a 10% discount at checkout
referrals.step3Desc: Once they complete a certification payment, your 10% commission is credited
referrals.step4Desc: You'll be notified to send your bank details. Commission is transferred directly to your account.
referrals.noReferrals: No referrals yet. Share your link to get started!

sara.greeting: Hi! I'm Sara, your ISO certification advisor. I can help you understand quality standards, guide you through the certification process, and answer any questions about your journey. How can I help you today?
sara.inputPlaceholder: Ask Sara anything about ISO certification...
sara.leadCapture: I'm enjoying helping you! If you'd like, share your email and interest below so our team can send you personalized updates and offers.
sara.errorMessage: I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again in a moment, or reach out to our support team for immediate help.
